title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 01 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 01 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 01 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 01/04/2025
Today, iron ore futures continued to shift from weakness to strength. The most-traded contract I2505 surged to 797 before slightly retreating,eventually closing at 792, with a daily gain of 1.86%. Traders showed good enthusiasm for selling, while steel mills restocked as needed.
